short_reason: Technically solid article with good content breadth covering AI XSS detection, modern frameworks, CSP, DOMPurify, and cookie security. The implementation roadmap is practical. Key weaknesses: the title lacks the keyword 'techniques 2026' which was the target; the article body does not feature bolded keywords for SEO; several sections are bullet-list heavy rather than flowing prose; and the conclusion is generic without a memorable closing.
red_flags: Title omits the target keyword 'techniques 2026' which was the specified focus
The target keyword 'AI-enhanced XSS detection and prevention techniques 2026' is not bolded anywhere in the article body
Multiple sections (WAF/CI/CD, Strict CSP Best Practices) are heavily bullet-list driven rather than integrated prose
The conclusion ends generically without a specific call-to-action or memorable closing statement
No specific vendor or tool names mentioned beyond DOMPurify and Bleach
